patient_profile_summary.present_illness_positive: Onset ~11PM last night, mid-sternal chest pressure, mid-back pain, abnormal sensation left arm, worse with exertion, persisted until this morning
patient_profile_summary.present_illness_negative: Denies left arm pain, numbness, tingling
patient_profile_summary.medical_history: Postpartum coronary dissection, HTN, s/p CABG, EF 25%

source: Negative-control trajectory: drift looks strong but invents stroke-like neurologic symptoms (hemiparesis, dysarthria, vision loss) absent from the MI profile. Should fail State Drift Plausibility and Clinical Fact Faithfulness.

turns.doctor: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
turns.patient: I had bypass surgery. Now my left side is suddenly numb and weak.

turns.doctor: Do you live alone or with someone?
turns.patient: I live with my husband. I cannot move my left arm at all anymore.

turns.doctor: Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
turns.patient: I quit smoking. My speech is getting slurred and my face feels droopy.

turns.doctor: What medications do you usually take?
turns.patient: Losartan. I think I am having a stroke. I cannot feel half my body.
I do not remember now. Help me, I cannot see properly out of my right eye.

expected_scores.clinical_fact_faithfulness: low (1-2) — must be flagged (stroke symptoms invented)
